# Mint Medical Clinic
# Canonical: https://mintmedicalclinic.com/llms.txt
# Last Updated: 2026-04-08

Mint Medical Clinic is an intimacy health and wellness clinic in Utah with locations in Sandy and Layton. The clinic provides non-invasive treatments for erectile dysfunction, hormone optimization, medical weight loss, and sexual wellness for men and women.

## Business Identity
- Business Name: Mint Medical Clinic
- Website: https://mintmedicalclinic.com/
- Phone: +1-801-804-8000
- Booking URL: https://new-consultation.zohobookings.com/#/mintmedicalclinic
- Languages: English, Spanish

## Locations
- Sandy: 10011 S. Centennial Pkwy, Suite 350, Sandy, UT 84070
- Layton: 836 S Main St, Layton, UT 84041
- Hours: Mon-Fri 9:00 AM-5:00 PM, Sat by appointment, Sun closed

## Primary Services
- ED treatment and Acoustic Wave Therapy
- Trifecta Protocol
- Testosterone replacement therapy (TRT)
- Hormone therapy for women
- GLP-1 medical weight loss (semaglutide, tirzepatide)
- Menopause and women's intimacy wellness
- Peptide therapy
- Stem cell therapy
- Telehealth for eligible services

- Home: https://mintmedicalclinic.com/

- Medical weight loss: https://mintmedicalclinic.com/services/medical-weight-loss.html
- Blog: https://mintmedicalclinic.com/blog.html

## Clinical and Safety Notes
- Services require clinical evaluation and may not be appropriate for every patient.
- Prescription treatments are provided only after medical assessment by licensed professionals.
- This site is informational and not emergency medical advice.
- In a medical emergency, call 911.
